en.title: 6G · Turning the vision of "integrate everything" into verifiable engineering

fields.Headline: 6G aims to "integrate everything"
fields.Headline-em: We provide the EM twin foundation it needs
fields.Sub: 6G integrates high frequency bands, AI, sensing, satellite-terrestrial integration, and digital twins into a single vision. This means the complexity of channel modeling, terminal testing, and network operations is rising exponentially. With its three-layer product line, MetaRadio simultaneously supports R&D, testing, and twin closed loops across the five 6G mainlines of sub-THz, RIS, AI-native channel, ISAC, and satellite-terrestrial integration.

items.title: Headline

items.title: Headline-em

items.title: Sub
items.text: 6G integrates high frequency bands, AI, sensing, satellite-terrestrial integration, and digital twins into a single vision. This means the complexity of channel modeling, terminal testing, and network operations is rising exponentially. With its three-layer product line, MetaRadio simultaneously supports R&D, testing, and twin closed loops across the five 6G mainlines of sub-THz, RIS, AI-native channel, ISAC, and satellite-terrestrial integration.

sections.label: The compound challenge brought by 6G's integration
sections.heading: Challenge · The compound challenge brought by 6G's integration

fields.Title: 6G is no longer "the next generation"—it presses every capability onto one map
fields.Description: The loss introduced by high frequency bands, the reconfigurable propagation introduced by RIS, ISAC making the communication link also a sensing link, NTN pushing the network into the sky, and AI-native channels demanding large-scale labeled training data. Each direction is hard on its own; stacked together they demand a unified EM modeling and twin platform even more.

table.Title: Pushing bands to sub-THz
table.Text: High-frequency loss and narrow beams make coverage and handover sensitive, and traditional model extrapolation breaks down.

table.Title: Reconfigurable intelligent surface
table.Text: RIS turns the "wall" into a controllable channel element, requiring EM simulation to directly characterize its phase/power response.

table.Title: AI-native data foundation
table.Text: End-to-end learning and AI channel coding/decoding require massive, diverse, and labelable high-fidelity channel data.

sections.label: A three-layer product line as the 6G research foundation
sections.heading: Solution · A three-layer product line as the 6G research foundation

fields.Title: A single engine covering 6G's five mainlines
fields.Description: MetaRadio's three-layer product line exists simultaneously across the three stages of 6G R&D, testing, and twin, and converges the five mainlines of sub-THz, RIS, ISAC, NTN, and AI-native onto a unified EM foundation.

table.Description: sub-THz simulation + RIS model + dual ISAC output + satellite trajectories + large-scale data generation.
sub-THz HIL for 6G prototype modules; joint commissioning with RIS testbeds, ISAC test benches, and NTN gNB.
6G twin network platform that is subscribable, drivable, ingestible with measurements, and connectable to digital twin cities.

sections.label: A unified foundation for 6G's five mainlines
sections.heading: Architecture · A unified foundation for 6G's five mainlines

table.Title: Multi-source modeling
table.Desc: Urban/indoor 3D + satellite trajectories + RIS deployment + moving targets + labeling.

table.Title: Unified EM kernel
table.Desc: sub-THz / RIS / ISAC / NTN simulated in a unified RT engine, physically consistent.

table.Title: 6G HIL
table.Desc: Prototype modules, RIS control boards, and ISAC/NTN gNB combined under the same HIL framework.

table.Title: AI data + twin services
table.Desc: Automatically produce AI training sets; the 6G twin network platform provides services externally.

table.Spec: 600 MHz – 325 GHz; dedicated sub-THz (90/140/220/300 GHz) models and material libraries
Element-level phase/amplitude modeling, array-level effective response; joint optimization and replay
Physically consistent sensing echoes + communication multipath dual output; multi-base-station coordination
LEO/MEO/GEO constellations + urban terrestrial 3D; multi-beam/multi-satellite handover
Large-scale labeled channel/sensing/positioning datasets; customizable sampling dimensions and protocols
ITU-R IMT-2030 framework, 3GPP Rel-19/20, IEEE 802.11bf, industry 6G white papers
sub-THz VNA/spread-spectrum/transceiver links; RIS testbeds; ISAC/NTN test benches
Private cloud + GPU clusters; supports university/research institute/operator 6G experimental environments
Kylin + domestic GPU; can form a validation ecosystem with domestic instruments and terminals

fields.Unified EM foundation: The five mainlines of sub-THz, RIS, ISAC, NTN, and AI channel converge onto a single engine.
fields.Physical consistency: The concurrent results of multiple phenomena are physically self-consistent, avoiding stitching errors.
fields.Large-scale AI data: Automatically produces labeled high-fidelity training sets, empowering AI-native 6G.
fields.HIL direct drive: A "simulate first, then measure" workflow for 6G prototype modules, shortening iteration cycles.
fields.Subscribable twin: The 6G twin as EM infrastructure shared by research and industry.
fields.Cross-disciplinary readability: Outputs intermediate products that are readable to algorithm, protocol, and network planning researchers alike.

table.Title: RIS experiments

table.Title: Satellite-terrestrial integration

zh-CN.title: 6G · 把"整合一切"的愿景，落地为可验证的工程

fields.Eyebrow: 行业垂直市场解决方案
fields.Headline: 6G 想要"整合一切"
fields.Headline-em: 我们提供它需要的电磁孪生底座
fields.Sub: 6G 把高频段、AI、感知、星地一体、数字孪生整合在一份愿景里。这意味着信道建模、终端测试与网络运营的复杂度都在指数级上升。乾径以三层产品在 sub-THz、RIS、AI-native channel、通感一体、星地一体五条 6G 主线上同时支撑研发、测试与孪生闭环。

items.title: Headline
items.text: 6G 想要"整合一切"

items.title: Headline-em
items.text: 我们提供它需要的电磁孪生底座

items.title: Sub
items.text: 6G 把高频段、AI、感知、星地一体、数字孪生整合在一份愿景里。这意味着信道建模、终端测试与网络运营的复杂度都在指数级上升。乾径以三层产品在 sub-THz、RIS、AI-native channel、通感一体、星地一体五条 6G 主线上同时支撑研发、测试与孪生闭环。

sections.label: 6G 的整合性带来的复合挑战
sections.heading: Challenge · 6G 的整合性带来的复合挑战

fields.Title: 6G 不再是"换一代"，而是把所有能力压在一张图上
fields.Description: 高频段带来的损耗、RIS 引入的可重构传播、ISAC 让通信链路同时是感知链路、NTN 把网络推到天上、AI-native 信道又要求大规模标注训练数据。每一个方向单独看都很难，叠在一起更需要统一的电磁建模与孪生平台。

table.Title: 频段拉到 sub-THz
table.Text: 高频损耗与窄波束让覆盖与切换变得敏感，传统模型外推失效。

table.Title: 可重构智能表面
table.Text: RIS 把"墙"变成可控信道元件，需要电磁仿真直接刻画其相位/功率响应。

table.Title: AI-native 数据底座
table.Text: 端到端学习、AI 信道编解码需要海量、多样、可标注的高保真信道数据。

sections.label: 三层产品作为 6G 研究底座
sections.heading: Solution · 三层产品作为 6G 研究底座

fields.Title: 同一引擎覆盖 6G 的五条主线
fields.Description: 乾径三层产品在 6G 研发、测试、孪生三个阶段同时存在，并把 sub-THz、RIS、ISAC、NTN、AI-native 五条主线收敛到统一的电磁底座上。

table.Description: sub-THz 仿真 + RIS 模型 + 通感双输出 + 卫星轨迹 + 大规模数据生成。
6G 原型模组的 sub-THz HIL；与 RIS 实验台、ISAC 测试台、NTN gNB 联调。
6G 孪生网络平台，可订阅、可驱动、可灌入实测、可对接数字孪生城市。

sections.label: 6G 五条主线的统一底座
sections.heading: Architecture · 6G 五条主线的统一底座

table.Title: 多源建模
table.Desc: 城市/室内 3D + 卫星轨迹 + RIS 部署 + 动目标 + 标注。

table.Title: 统一电磁内核
table.Desc: sub-THz / RIS / ISAC / NTN 统一在 RT 引擎中仿真，物理一致。

table.Title: 6G HIL
table.Desc: 原型模组、RIS 控制板、ISAC/NTN gNB 在同一 HIL 框架下联合。

table.Title: AI 数据 + 孪生服务
table.Desc: 自动产出 AI 训练集；6G 孪生网络平台对外提供服务。

table.规格: 600 MHz – 325 GHz；专项 sub-THz (90/140/220/300 GHz) 模型与材料库
单元级相位/幅度建模、阵列级有效响应；可联合优化与回放
物理一致的感知回波 + 通信多径双输出；多基站协同
LEO/MEO/GEO 星座 + 城市地面 3D；多波束/多星切换
大规模标注信道/感知/定位数据集；可定制采样维度与协议
ITU-R IMT-2030 框架、3GPP Rel-19/20、IEEE 802.11bf、行业 6G 白皮书
sub-THz 矢网/扩频/收发链路；RIS 实验台；ISAC/NTN 测试台
私有云 + GPU 集群；支持高校/研究院/运营商 6G 实验环境
麒麟 + 国产 GPU；可与国产仪器与终端形成验证生态

fields.统一电磁底座: sub-THz、RIS、ISAC、NTN、AI 信道五条主线收敛到同一引擎。
fields.物理一致性: 多种现象的并发结果在物理上自洽，避免拼接误差。
fields.大规模 AI 数据: 自动产出标注的高保真训练集，赋能 AI-native 6G。
fields.HIL 直驱: 6G 原型模组的"先仿真后实测"工作流，缩短迭代周期。
fields.可订阅孪生: 6G 孪生作为研究与产业共享的电磁基础设施。
fields.跨学科可读: 输出对算法、协议、网络规划研究者都可读的中间产物。
